candidate_definition_hints.text: ⎈❏ Terminal and Web console for Kubernetes

FROM node:12.16.2-alpine3.11 as builder WORKDIR /kubebox COPY lib lib/ COPY package.json package-lock.json index.js webpack.config.js webpack.hjs.language.js webpack.node.js ./ RUN npm install RUN npm run bundle FROM alpine:3.11 ENV TERM xterm-256color ENV TERMINFO=/lib/terminfo…
